creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: madpilot
Date: Wed May 14 09:10:41 2014
New Revision: 354030
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354030
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354030/

Log:
  - Stage support
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:		ports/189678
  Submitted by:	Henry Hu <henry.hu.sh@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/textproc/ibus-qt/Makefile
  head/textproc/ibus-qt/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/ibus-qt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/ibus-qt/Makefile	Wed May 14 09:07:19 2014	(r354029)
+++ head/textproc/ibus-qt/Makefile	Wed May 14 09:10:41 2014	(r354030)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	ibus-qt
 PORTVERSION=	1.3.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GOOGLE_CODE}
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-Source
@@ -11,6 +11,8 @@ DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-Sou
 MAINTAINER=	henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	IBus input method module for Qt4
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/libdata/pkgconfig/ibus-1.0.pc:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/ibus \
 	${LOCALBASE}/libdata/pkgconfig/dbus-1.pc:${PORTSDIR}/devel/dbus \
 	${LOCALBASE}/bin/icu-config:${PORTSDIR}/devel/icu \
@@ -21,7 +23,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${LOCALBASE}/libdata/pkgcon
 
 USE_QT4=	gui dbus moc_build qmake_build moc_build uic_build rcc_build
 USES=		cmake pkgconfig
-CMAKE_ARGS=	-DDOCDIR=${PREFIX}/share/doc/ibus-qt
+CMAKE_ARGS=	-DDOCDIR=${PREFIX}/share/doc/ibus-qt -DLIBDIR=lib
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 CFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
@@ -29,8 +31,4 @@ LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 PROJECTHOST=	ibus
 WRKSRC=			${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-post-install:
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/textproc/ibus-qt/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/ibus-qt/pkg-plist	Wed May 14 09:07:19 2014	(r354029)
+++ head/textproc/ibus-qt/pkg-plist	Wed May 14 09:10:41 2014	(r354030)
@@ -26,9 +26,9 @@ lib/libibus-qt.so
 lib/libibus-qt.so.1
 lib/libibus-qt.so.1.3.0
 lib/qt4/plugins/inputmethods/libqtim-ibus.so
-%%DOCSDIR%%/AUTHORS
-%%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALL
-%%DOCSDIR%%/README
-@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/AUTHORS
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALL
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README
+%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
 @dirrmtry lib/qt4/plugins/inputmethods
 @dirrm include/ibus-qt
